description: Toolhouse provides AI workers/agents that perform repetitive tasks and connect to many third-party tools and data sources. Its product is positioned around creating and running autonomous workers for business workflows.
summary: toolhouse.ai publicly documents a developer-facing Workers API, but the accessible docs pages do not expose machine-readable specs, concrete endpoint/base URL details, or verifiable authentication mechanics; no separate GraphQL, MCP connect endpoint, or CLI surface could be confirmed from public docs.
